user.title: Connect to your Healthbox 3
user.description: No devices found automatically - enter the IP address or hostname of your Renson Healthbox 3 on your local network.

discovery_select.title: Select a Healthbox 3
discovery_select.description: Multiple devices were found on your network. Select the one to set up.

api_key.title: Optional: unlock full sensor data
api_key.description: Without an API key, this integration only reads basic room/valve data and can control boost (v1 API). To also get temperature, humidity, CO2, VOC and air quality sensors, plus ventilation profile control, contact Renson support and request an API key for this device (serial: {serial}) - they'll ask for its serial and warranty number. Already activated a key directly against the device yourself (e.g. via the POST command in Renson's docs)? You can leave this blank - activation lives on the device itself, so this integration will detect it automatically. Otherwise, leave this blank to continue without one; you can add a key later via Reconfigure.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Healthbox 3
reauth_confirm.description: The API key for this Healthbox 3 is no longer valid (Renson-issued keys expire after several years). The integration has fallen back to v1-only functionality in the meantime. Enter a new key to restore sensor and profile access.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Healthbox 3
reconfigure.description: Update the device's IP address and/or API key. Leave the API key blank to keep the one already stored - it's only changed if you type a new one.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device. Check the IP address and that it's reachable on your network.
error.invalid_api_key: The API key was rejected. Double check the key and that it matches this device's serial/warranty number.

abort.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device.
abort.no_matching_entry: No existing Healthbox 3 entry matches this device.
abort.relocated: This device's connection info was updated automatically after it was found at a new network address.
abort.unique_id_mismatch: This IP address belongs to a different Healthbox 3 device than the one being reconfigured.

room_not_found.message: Room {room_id} is no longer present on this Healthbox device.

device_error.title: Healthbox reported a {severity} error
device_error.description:
The Healthbox reported a {category} error (code {code}): {description}

Reported at {time}. This can't be cleared from Home Assistant - use the Renson app or the device itself to acknowledge or resolve it. Check the Renson app or contact your installer for detailed troubleshooting steps. This issue will disappear automatically once the device stops reporting it.
